audience_policies.source_phrase: Pass allows 50% Discount for up to two(2) adults and two(2) children in one vehicle. Children under 2 are free. Pass does not cover tickets to the Alden Digital Planetarium, the Explorer Express train, or special ticketed events. May not be combined with other offers, group rates

coupon.source_phrase_block: Pass allows 50% Discount for up to two(2) adults and two(2) children in one vehicle. Children under 2 are free. Pass does not cover tickets to the Alden Digital Planetarium, the Explorer Express train, or special ticketed events. May not be combined with other offers, group rates, or special event prices. No pets please.
